sat         2007-02-22 12:44:29 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    security             Makefile 
  Added files:
    security/jeta        Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    security/jeta/files  pkg-deinstall.in pkg-install.in 
                         pkg-message.in 
  Log:
  Add port security/jeta:
  
  Jeta is the Horde wrapper around various Java SSH applets.  It allows users
  to login via a terminal window to the server on which the Horde application is
  running.
  
  WWW: http://www.horde.org/jeta/
  
  PR:             ports/109095
  Submitted by:   Beech Rintoul <beech@alaskaparadise.com>
